cycleContext.note: June 4 scan (14-day window: May 21–June 4). Key signals: (1) Iran June 1–2 political executions of January 2026 protesters; (2) Oracle June 15 WARN Act final deadline — 11 days away; (3) Ebola DRC/Uganda 381/64 DRC + 19/2 Uganda; (4) Australia $1.43B PFAS suit against 3M filed May 28; (5) Minnesota MPCA new 3M PFAS suit May 2026; (6) EU Returns Regulation enters force June 12; (7) Arizona AG June 1 health insurer price-fixing cartel suit — 8 insurers + MultiPlan; (8) UN Security Council June 6 demanded release of 73 Houthi-detained UN staff; (9) Bolivia: 4 killed, 127 detained; terrorism charges vs. 25 union leaders; (10) Myanmar June 1 airstrikes on IDP camps while residents slept.

ESCALATING: DRC 381/64; Uganda 19/2. WHO+Africa CDC $518M plan. PHEIC active. No vaccine.
ACTIVE: June 1–2 executions of January 2026 protesters. 146+ executions since war began.

Bolivia June 2026: 4 protesters killed, 127 detained; terrorism charges against 25 union leaders including COB chief

prioritizedEntities.name: Iran
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 2026: Three political prisoners executed June 1–2 (January 2026 protesters). Arbitrary arrests of academics, lawyers, filmmakers continuing. 146 YTD executions. Execution machine accelerating under cover of war context.

prioritizedEntities.name: Oracle Corporation
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 15 final WARN Act deadline: 30,000 workers sign-release-or-forfeit. WARN pay absorbed into severance, workers denied separate compensation. Active investigations in WA and MO.

prioritizedEntities.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Ebola Bundibugyo: 381 cases/64 deaths as of June 4. No vaccine. PHEIC. WHO+Africa CDC $518M plan. 26.5M concurrent acute hunger.

prioritizedEntities.name: UnitedHealth Group
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: DOJ civil+criminal Medicare fraud probe. MA AG $100M Medicaid fraud suit May 29. Arizona AG June 1 price-fixing cartel suit. Multiple state AG coordinated investigation. AI denial class action active.

prioritizedEntities.name: Russia
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 2 attack on Kyiv: 22 civilians killed including children (656 drones + 73 missiles). Putin rejected direct talks June 6. UN: 15,850+ civilian deaths. Ongoing war crimes.

prioritizedEntities.name: United States
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 17th ICE detention death in 2026. 2 US citizens fatally shot by ICE (January). Fast-track deportation ruled unlawful. National Guard in 5 cities. DEI disclosures down 65%.

prioritizedEntities.name: 3M Company
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Australia $1.43B PFAS lawsuit filed May 28 (largest ever against 3M). Minnesota MPCA new PFAS suit May 2026. Two major lawsuits in same month. River contamination at 310,000 ppt.

prioritizedEntities.name: CVS Health
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: $250M+ 340B RICO lawsuits May 21. Arizona AG June 1 cartel suit. March: Aetna $117.7M DOJ settlement. Medicare kickback case proceeding. Multiple simultaneous fronts.

prioritizedEntities.name: xAI / Grok
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Pentagon $200M classified access. Sen. Warren formal safety demands. CSAM, murder advice, antisemitic outputs documented. NSA/GSA flagged unmet federal AI risk requirements. EU GPAI Code: xAI did not sign.

prioritizedEntities.name: Sudan
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: World's largest humanitarian crisis: 33.7M needing assistance. Famine confirmed. 135,000 in Phase 5. Response 16.2% funded. Lean season worsening June–Sep.

prioritizedEntities.name: South Sudan
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 7.8M (56%) acutely food insecure April–July. 28,000 in Phase 5. Four counties at imminent famine risk. 2.11M children facing acute malnutrition.

prioritizedEntities.name: Afghanistan
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: UNSC Resolution 2818 extended UNAMA mandate. Taliban ban on women at UN premises continues — aid operations severely compromised. Decrees authorizing domestic violence and removing marriage age minimum.

prioritizedEntities.name: Myanmar
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: June 1 airstrikes on IDP camps: 2 civilians killed while sleeping. Multiple strikes on Rakhine shelters triggering fresh displacement. 2025 deadliest year for aerial attacks.

prioritizedEntities.name: Yemen
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: 73 UN staff in Houthi detention — UNSC demanded release June 6. One WFP worker died in custody. 23.1M needing support; HNRP 14% funded. Aid halted in Houthi-controlled areas.

prioritizedEntities.name: Nigeria
prioritizedEntities.news_summary: Borno State: 15,000+ in IPC Phase 5 for first time in decade. ~6M in northeast at crisis level during lean season. WFP at risk of complete funding depletion.

sectorAlerts.description: DRC/Uganda Ebola: 381 cases/64 deaths DRC; 19 cases/2 deaths Uganda as of June 5. 88 total deaths. WHO+Africa CDC $518M response plan announced June 5. PHEIC active since May 17. No Bundibugyo-specific vaccine. Contact tracing below 50%. Health worker and Kampala cases detected.

EU Returns Regulation enters force June 12 2026. Features: return hubs outside EU, extended detention to 2 years (unlimited for security risks), forced returns mandatory if cooperation fails, fast-track safe-third-country procedures. 250+ civil society groups warn of offshore prisons. Affects 27 EU member states.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: germany, austria, netherlands, denmark, sweden, france, spain, italy, greece

sectorAlerts.description: Arizona AG June 1: MultiPlan/Claritev + 8 major insurers (UnitedHealth, Elevance, CVS/Aetna, Cigna, Humana, Molina, Centene, HCSC) sued for price-fixing cartel suppressing out-of-network physician/hospital payments via shared algorithm. Maricopa County Superior Court. RICO triple damages possible.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: unitedhealth-group, cvs-health, elevance-health, humana, molina-healthcare, centene

sectorAlerts.description: EU AI Act full enforcement powers over GPAI model providers activate August 2 2026 — 59 days away. Commission can request documentation, conduct evaluations, impose fines, require market withdrawal. 24 providers signed Code of Practice; Meta and xAI did not sign. High-risk AI system obligations deadline 2027–2028.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: openai, anthropic, alphabet-google, meta-ai, xai-grok, cohere, mistral-ai

sectorAlerts.description: Oracle June 15 is the final WARN Act termination date for 30,000 workers. Sign-release-or-forfeit-severance ultimatum. WARN pay absorbed into severance for newer employees. Active investigations in Washington State and Missouri.

52.8M face acute food insecurity June–August 2026 across West Africa/Sahel. Nigeria Borno first Phase 5 in decade; 15,000 people. 3.5M besieged in Mali/Burkina/Niger triangle. WFP at risk of complete depletion of emergency food assistance funds.
sectorAlerts.entities_potentially_affected: nigeria, mali, niger, chad, burkina-faso, cameroon, central-african-republic

sectorAlerts.description: 17 deaths in ICE detention in 2026 (~1 death per 6 days, highest rate on record). Fast-track third-country deportation ruled unlawful by federal judge. Two US citizens fatally shot by ICE in January 2026. 40+ total deaths since Trump returned to office. $45B Congressional detention expansion approved.

Two major PFAS lawsuits filed against 3M in same month: Australia A$2B/$1.43B (May 28) over 28 military base contaminations; Minnesota MPCA new suit over Cottage Grove Mississippi River contamination at 310,000 ppt. Dual major government plaintiffs signal escalating regulatory accountability.
